# Empowr CIC

> Empowr CIC is a UK-based Community Interest Company focused on empowering individuals through education, employment, and community connection.

Empowr CIC runs structured programmes for adults and young people — including skills development, mentorship, and supported pathways into freelance and professional work. It operates as a social enterprise, reinvesting its activity into measurable community benefit.

## Programmes

- Adult skills and development sessions
- Children's activities and learning (Kids Space)
- Empowr Freelancer Network — supported pathways into self-employment
- Empowr Heroes — community fundraising and donation platform

## Platforms

- [EELA](https://eela.empowrcic.org): Session discovery and membership platform — find and book Empowr programmes
- [EFN](https://efn.empowrcic.org): Empowr Freelancer Network — onboarding, assignments, and payments for freelancers
- [Empowr Heroes](https://heroes.empowrcic.org): Fundraising and donation platform supporting Empowr CIC's mission

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://empowrcic.org): Overview of Empowr CIC's mission and programmes
- [About](https://empowrcic.org/about): Background, values, board, and governance
- [Get Involved](https://empowrcic.org/get-involved): How to participate, volunteer, or support

## Contact

- Website: https://empowrcic.org
